dvids.title: Exercise Obangame Express Closes the 15th Iteration in Cameroon
dvids.desc: Exercise Obangame Express (OE) 2026 officially concluded during a ceremony in Douala, Cameroon, host nation for the 15th iteration, April 30. dvids.title: USNS Robert E. Peary Enables 4th Fleet Combat Readiness with 154-Day Deployment
dvids.desc: NORFOLK – The U.S. Navy’s Lewis and Clark-class dry cargo ship USNS Robert E. Peary (T-AKE-5) returns to homeport at Naval Station Norfolk, April 29, 2026. dvids.title: 192nd MPs deploy in support of Operation Epic Fury
dvids.desc: Approximately 150 Soldiers from Headquarters and Headquarters Company,  192nd Military Police Battalion, Connecticut Army National Guard, participated in a deployement ceremony at Bradley Air National Guard Base today, April 28, 2026.
dvids.unit_name: Connecticut National Guard Public Affairs Office
